name: Breakfast Before
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the sausage and drain any excess fat.
2. In a bowl, beat together the eggs, milk, salt, and mustard.
3. Place bread cubes, cooked sausage, and shredded cheese in a 9x13 inch baking dish.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the top of the ingredients in the dish.
5. Refrigerate the dish overnight.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Bake for 45 minutes or until the center is set.
